message:
🐛 Fix DeploymentProgress crash on unexpected status values (#2298)

statusConfig[deployment.status] returns undefined for any status not
in {running, deploying, failed}, causing a property-of-undefined crash
on .icon access. Add a fallback UNKNOWN_STATUS_STYLE and type the
config as Record<string, ...> for safety.

Fixes #2236

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
